journey-producer.reason: The repository has deterministic Playwright smoke tests and a raw-evidence reducer, but no versioned adapter that runs the contract prompts as uncoached seeded persona browser agents. Scripted route actions cannot be signed as machine-journey PASS.

independent-verifier.reason: PASS requires an external verifier command, identity, key id, public Ed25519 key, and pinned public-key digest. The producer never generates or receives the private key.
